variants.title: Fleetguard AF26454 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P789842
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26454 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.

variants.title: Donaldson P789842 Air Panel, Ventilation
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P789842 Air Panel, Ventilation is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel, ventilation applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
